item.title: If you need help with medical bills
item.description:
@Ranlothir 's post yesterday reminded me - if you need assistance with medical bills, Christy Snodgrass https://www.instagram.com/p/CdE8xQ3LdSv has been a warrior in dispensing advice on how to negotiate lower costs. Her instagram feed is filled with a ton of advice and additional tactics on how to help.
segment 2
segment 3 also, @Balikadam shared this video with some great resources: https://imgur.com/gallery/we-should-share-as-many-people-as-possible-who-might-need-medical-bill-help-CtNDGxz
item.dc:creator: lydecker17

item.title: Trans Girl Tuesday
item.description:
Doing something different again this week. Saw a lot of timeline photos the other day and they were so inspiring. Honestly not sure what to do going forward. I try to post stuff I like and not talk about serious shit, but there's this overwhelming sense of impending dread I'm sure most of us here are feeling that can't be ignored. I'm even worried by highlighting people like this I'm making it easier for the wrong people to find them. These are all easily visible, it's not like I went digging through r/trans_timelines or anything. Still, I don't know. This country fucking failed in epic proportions, and it's not okay. I've lost a lot of faith in humanity, and just like...the universe in general. All I can do for now is put it in the back of my mind and enjoy what I can now, and seeing people overcome whatever bullshit "fate" had in store for them and find a way to be happy brings me joy.
Faith Girlcel is actually the only one here I was following before, she has a pretty wild sense of humor, her posts are a joy to read.
item.dc:creator: MermaidNinja

item.title: A fully intact mummified Sabre-toothed tiger cub was discovered in Siberia
item.description:
A mummified ice age cub from Siberia is the first known mummy of a sabre-toothed cat, and its discovery is generating ripples of excitement among paleontologists. The mummy’s exceptional preservation provided the first view of what sabre-toothed cats looked like. Written in its soft tissues are clues about where the cat’s muscles were bulkiest and how that may have shaped its hunting style.
Abundant fur and mummified flesh covered the partial corpse, and its face, forelimbs and torso were nearly intact, scientists reported Thursday in the journal Scientific Reports. The cub’s dark brown fur was short but very thick, measuring about 0.8 to 1.2 inches (20 to 30 millimeters) long. Its fur was also found to be surprisingly soft.
“It’s a fantastic feeling to see with your own eyes the life appearance of a long-extinct animal. Especially when it comes to such an interesting predator as the sabre-toothed cat.” These extinct carnivores, which are distant relatives of modern big cats, are known for their long, bladelike canines, which could measure up to 8 inches (20 centimeters) long. basin.
An artist rendering of what a fully-grown one looked like thousands of years ago
The mummy is the first evidence from Asia of the sabre-toothed cat species Homotherium latidens, Lopatin said, though fossilized bones were previously found at sites in the Netherlands and in the Canadian Yukon. Other types of frozen ice age mummies, such as woolly rhinos and mammoths, are known from the Siberian region of Yakutia in Russia. But mummified cats, by comparison, “are extremely rare,”. Before this discovery, there were just two known cat mummies, both cubs of the cave lion Panthera spelaea from Yakutia’s Uyandina River
And it’s not just the anatomy of the Homotherium mummy that makes it so special — the discovery also provides a unique glimpse into the evolutionary history of the entire feline group, Tseng said. Prior genetic analysis of DNA from Homotherium fossils showed that the genus split from other ancient cats about 18 million years ago. Not only is the cub the sole mummified example of the Homotherium genus, “it represents a part of that cat family tree that goes back almost to the origin of the cat family,” he said. “That adds to the mind-blowingness of this discovery.” “Now, we have added the Homotherium cub to this list,” Extracting DNA from the mummy will be an important next step for understanding this species, as will more detailed examination of the mummy’s skeleton, muscles and hair https://www.nature.com/articles/s41598-024-79546-1
item.dc:creator: Pasquinel

item.title: After 9 years, I am me.
item.description:
PART 1: see my other posts for Part2: CURRENT UPDATE!!! On 9/8/22 I will celebrate 9 years in transition from assigned male at birth to fully living and succeeding at life as the woman I am. On 9/2 I will celebrate the one year anniversary of My GRS, and I cannot even begin to describe what it feels to finally feel right, to be complete, to be happy and to finally be me.
Edit* Thank you everyone for the warm reception and all the wonderful questions and responses and acceptance! I feel so blessed to be a part of this family!
item.dc:creator: SlanderousLici

item.title: We got snow this morning!
item.description:
We don't get much of it here in UK, so i cherish it every time it appears!
I grew up in Poland with proper winters, you know, walking to school uphill and in waist high snow drifts, lol
Makes me feel happy, like a little kid! Have a great day, guys :)
item.dc:creator: LiillooDallasMultipass

item.title: Killer frost cosplay; Annabelle
item.description: It amazes me that low budget costumes always manage to get it right compared to million dollar budget movies
item.dc:creator: nothisagain

item.title: I FINALLY got my handicap van. I can now go anywhere!
item.description: It's been a long hard road to get here. I was very lucky. The people at United Access really stepped up and helped me. Normally these vehicles start at $40,000 but I got mine for way less. Watch Out World, here I come!

item.title: Samus cosplay from Metroid
item.description:
Zero suits are and easy cosplay but I drew the alien larvae insert in the purse and painted both the boots and the gun so that makes me feel like I still put effort into it.
My friend did my makeup and we thought it'd be fun to do it in her armors colors.
This was for the Grand Rapids comicon and was a lot of fun. I plan on doing this one again especially since I have a coworker offering to 3d print her helmet and arm canon for me.
Nyx tax! Big yawn!

item.title: I walked 5 miles for a turkey
item.description:
Eleven pounds! Good enough for me! Got it at a turkey giveaway over the weekend. I would save it for Thansgiving but I'm hungry now!
No family, no transportation, no money until Friday. I wore my shoes out but at least I'm not hungry. Let the turkey dishes and sandwiches begin!
item.dc:creator: cooppTvFlyer

item.title: Backlogged memes: clitortoise
item.description:
The ONLY good thing about America is the food. Taco Bell. Chipotle. Wendy’s. How am I supposed to get through an entire pregnancy with no Taco Bell??? And they brought back the tostada! Bastards. Get over here. Take subways place.
And somehow they’re complaining about it??? Being a house spouse is the effing dream if men were smart they’d be pushing to make Barbie land real and get themselves a beach position
When I was a teacher my kids workload was directly proportional to how much they tested me. Surprisingly few occasions once they figured that out
It’s so true. Get rid of your embarrassment and you open up a whole new world for yourself.
To be fair you can fight systemic oppression with Molotovs. Kinda bummed that America is making no effort to do that. You know what I’d do if I had a big following? I’d convince them all not to buy Christmas presents this year for anyone and make a public announcement. Hit those corps where it hurts, bitches. But alas nobody listens to me and every activist with a big following is still in the “talk to your congressmen” stage of activism (ie useless)
It’s super true and this is also true of hot tortured villains I wanna be an evil queen for my poor little meow meow
I haven’t played animal crossing yet but this will be my strategy. >:) that raccoon guy better get his house in order
So far so good…but winter cometh
Not me, me and kiddo and hubs and fetus are gonna soak in the Christmas vibes as long as we can. We’re making Thanksgiving dinner and then going to the Christmas market. Hard not to be festive in this country they practically invented Christmas
It’s suddenly very clear why
Psst it’s a metaphor for our current situation One of my threads went viral, re: Game of Thrones, and a LOT of the comments are incels accusing me of not reading the books. Which is just hilarious. I haven’t even BEGUN my rant about how they’re sexist garbage gurl buckle up Those books were triggering as hell and I probably should not have read them but I did and I am not taking this bullshit lying down no sir
This person is a prophet of our generation
Hot
Free rent in exchange for dishes is an amazing deal. Someone come do my dishes and the attic is yours, it’s huge. Like 60m2
Anxiety hour
Shakespeare
And or just set them on fire I’d like that. Seriously where’s the fire ppl these things gave me asthma and possibly lead poisoning as a child
They get contentious
I would do that in my video game except I doubt anyone will care enough about the story for it to get made. Publisher keeps being all umm don’t get your hopes up on making any real profits until like book 5 and video games are only for profitable books. Why can’t I go viral like fourth wing? Or freaking LIGHTLARK. that girl did NOT deserve that shit she cheated and yet she still wins
Can’t really argue
I’m 3 and 5 I think
They do kind of suck but they predate the piano so they’re trying Oh fun fact, Mozart lived briefly in my city and there’s a museum about his dad, did you know his dad was a stage mom and his sister was just as talented as he was but nobody cared about her?
Ecstasy and shrooms turn people communist quick drug the water supply
A I think, but is now the time to talk about his yogurt enema loving brother or
I still think zoo exhibits should be different animals from the same ecosystem chilling. As long as they don’t eat each other it’s fine. My husband insists that prairie dogs will dig holes and the giraffes will trip but I would posit that this does not happen in nature and thus it’s probably fine
So tempted to send to my parent
I’d love to be able to say that but unfortunately my slutty inner self is drowned out by my asexuality and autism and I have no interest in being touched so we’ll never know.
Kevin is a deeply amusing name for me and the butt of many a joke in German culture as well.
I know they’re trying to help but god damn, if bone broth really cured autism I’m pretty sure I would’ve heard about it on Oprah, Becky
Probably iron man, but people really do take these things way too seriously. To me all religious figures are like marvel heroes. I’m just sitting there like a granny going oh that’s nice dear while they put their lil posters on the wall.
I am convinced past lives exist. I’ve had really vivid dreams about at least one of them before.
Sent to me by my sister who still thinks it’s endlessly hilarious that my husband wore flip flops in every situation for like ten years. It was Austin, you can pull that off there.
That was today and the only covered sheltered area had a smoker and it was not fun I did feel like broccoli but not in a good way
I’ve run into this issue several times but the key is making it clear it’s not gonna happen and then you have a lovely but much smaller harem of dude friends that like you for you. And THEN you can pick any of them to date.
Me mid sentence
God is testing us all, my dude, and we are failing. Horizon Zero Dawn approacheth. (For those who don’t know they had a decade of massive ecological disasters in the 2030s and 20% of the population died and then there were some efforts to “claw back” and detox technology etc was invented and then some asshole invented military robots that fed on biomass and triggered an extinction event and so far we are right on track for all that)
Some dude left a bag at the airport and they just like put tape around it and left it there. My brother in Christ if it explodes I want it much further away.
It’s true and then it feels good and then you start doing it all the time. This is how many addictions start but also self love.
APPARENTLY.
It may be tempting to lick it. But the salmonella risk is too great.
I’ve been pulling way back and it’s made me a lot happier. I like Imgur tho Imgur is nice to me. Really I should be working on book2 BUT I had a new idea for a horrorotica (a horror but there’s some explicit consensual sex scenes) and a new format for a middle grade I’m working on. So it’s been mostly that. I wrote an outline of one of the sex scenes n my email and meant to send it to me but accidentally sent it to Alibaba customer service which….yeah I’m not getting that coupon.
Shits rough. The kitchen has not been clean in months.
Feta is probably a pretty lightweight cheese actually if it’s not soaked in stuff This restaurant served me a baked feta and it was covered in dates and red onions in the oven and hooooooooly shit. Game changer. Highly recommend. Another recipe: Mix together raw tuna or salmon chunks, avocado, a little mango, a little jalapeño, and some pico de gallo (or just tomato) lightly together in a bowl like tossing a salad. Dump on top of some tortilla chips and drizzle with spicy mayo. You’re welcome.
That’s my time later friends
item.dc:creator: kirbyvictorious
